    Methods in st.orm.core.spi that return types with arguments of type Entity
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EntityCache<? extends Entity<?>,?>
    TransactionContext.entityCache(Class<? extends Entity<?>> entityType, CacheRetention retention)
    Returns a transaction-local cache for entities of the given type, creating one with the specified retention behavior if it does not yet exist.
    EntityCache<? extends Entity<?>,?>
    TransactionContext.findEntityCache(Class<? extends Entity<?>> entityType)
    Returns an existing transaction-local cache for entities of the given type, or null if none exists.
    EntityCache<? extends Entity<?>,?>
    TransactionContext.getEntityCache(Class<? extends Entity<?>> entityType)
    Returns an existing transaction-local cache for entities of the given type.
    Method parameters in st.orm.core.spi with type arguments of type Entity
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    EntityCache<? extends Entity<?>,?>
    TransactionContext.entityCache(Class<? extends Entity<?>> entityType, CacheRetention retention)
    Returns a transaction-local cache for entities of the given type, creating one with the specified retention behavior if it does not yet exist.
    EntityCache<? extends Entity<?>,?>
    TransactionContext.findEntityCache(Class<? extends Entity<?>> entityType)
    Returns an existing transaction-local cache for entities of the given type, or null if none exists.
    EntityCache<? extends Entity<?>,?>
    TransactionContext.getEntityCache(Class<? extends Entity<?>> entityType)
    Returns an existing transaction-local cache for entities of the given type.

    static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID>
    void
    JoinedEntityHelper.deleteBatchByRef(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, List<Ref<E>> refs)
    Deletes a batch of joined entities by reference from all extension and base tables.
    static <E extends Entity<ID>, ID>
    void
    JoinedEntityHelper.deleteById(QueryTemplate queryTemplate, Model<E,ID> model, ID id)
    Deletes a joined entity by primary key from all extension and base tables.

    Updates a joined entity in both the base and extension tables.
